title: NoOverlays
body:
No Overlays
Disable all in-game overlays for a cleaner Minecraft experience.

Fire overlay when burning

Pumpkin overlay when worn

Spyglass zoom overlay

Powder snow freezing effect

Fully client-side (won’t affect servers)

Compatible with most mods and resource packs



Note: HUD elements like the hotbar and crosshair are not affected—only screen-wide visual effects.
